seoTitle: Cape Conway vs Cape Hillsborough — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Conway and Cape Hillsborough. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Conway vs Cape Hillsborough: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Conway and Cape Hillsborough.
heading: Cape Conway vs Cape Hillsborough — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Conway, Queensland and Cape Hillsborough, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Conway has a lower overall climate risk score (21/100) compared to Cape Hillsborough (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Conway or Cape Hillsborough safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Conway has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Cape Hillsborough scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Conway scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Cape Hillsborough scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Conway or Cape Hillsborough?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Conway has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
